description_long: This car store is a modern, two-story commercial building with a prominent glass facade at the front, allowing clear views into the showroom. The structure features a combination of dark exterior walls and large, grid-patterned windows, with a curved glass entrance area that adds architectural interest. The front lot is an open parking area displaying several cars in various colors, while a green rooftop terrace with landscaping and a circular feature is visible above the entrance. The building includes a covered driveway and garage area, as well as a rear section with additional parking. The overall design is sleek and functional, with clean lines and a focus on showcasing vehicles. The use of glass and open spaces emphasizes transparency and accessibility for customers.
description: A modern car store with a glass-fronted showroom, dark exterior walls, and a prominent parking area displaying multiple cars. Features include a curved glass entrance, rooftop terrace, and a sleek, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the glass facade, curved entrance, rooftop terrace, and main parking area with several cars displayed.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the building, grid-patterned windows, and partial visibility of the interior and rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the covered driveway, garage area, and the green rooftop terrace above the entrance.
description_view_3: Direct front view emphasizing the main parking lot, glass entrance, and arrangement of cars in front of the building.
attribute_displayed_cars: Seven cars visible in the parking area: various colors including yellow, green, blue, pink, gray, and purple; makes and models not discernible; arranged in front and side of the building.
attribute_glass_facade: Curved, full-height glass panels at the front entrance and large grid-patterned windows on the upper floors.
attribute_architectural_style: modern with minimalist and contemporary elements, featuring clean lines, glass facade, and a rooftop terrace.
